title: Igneo's Combat Revamp
description: A complete overhaul of the vanilla enchantment system and (eventually) armor system! This will change the boring stat increase system into a skillfull and interesting ability system!
body:
Large portions of artwork done by Radi and Hadopalegic Rainbow, thank y'all!!



THIS MOD IS HEAVILY HEAVILY RECOMMENDED TO BE PLAYED WITH THE FOLLOWING MODS:
Parcool
Better combat
Weaponworks

IT IS NOT PLUG AND PLAY, YOU MUST ADD WAYS TO GET THE ENCHANTMENTS YOURSELF

The vision is to completely upturn the basis of Minecraft's combat system. As it stands, Minecraft's combat is at a severe loss when it comes to depth and complexity. My mod aims to fix that, by killing two birds with one stone. Enchantments are also a very poor system so by completely changing what enchantments are available and how you obtain them, I can turn Minecraft into a unique, and interesting flavor of combat, not seen in many other games.



First off, enchantments are now one-per-piece, no more stupid god armor like in the base game, but instead a system where you have to think carefully and make a build suitable for your playstyle.

The enchantment table has also been reworked. Now instead of in the base chance based xp system, all enchants now have a static cost, and you unlock what enchants you can enchant your items with by placing enchanted books in chiseled bookshelves where the normal bookshelves would be. This is not compatible with modded enchants

Nearly all vanilla enchants have been removed besides silk touch and riptide. Effeciency has been replaced with brute touch, which is efficiency 7, except it doesnt drop blocks. This may raise a huge question in your mind considering durability, and although not removed, the increasing cost in anvils has been, as well as your ability to enchant via enchanted books on it, in order for you to not make the mistake of not putting it in your collection.

After testing this thousands of times on the testing server, the same very server this mod is designed for, we have concluded it makes combat so much better. I hope you enjoy it as much as we do. If you want to see it in action, then feel free to [join us!](https://discord.gg/9znQuP3ewn)

If you were worried about all the vanilla enchantments being removed however, they have been repurposed! Armor trims have now been given effects, many being what the vanilla enchantments were! If you were really adamant on trims not having effects, that's fine though, since you can turn this off in the config, but I just recommend using cosmetic armors. all the effects listed here here:

Coast: Respiration

Dune: Fire aspect, less base damage

Eye: Magic and lightning resistance

Host: Slower attack speed, greater protection

Raiser: Jump boost

Rib: Fire protection

Sentry: greater knockback, less defense

Shaper: More armor toughness (blocks lighter hits)

Silence: Slower move speed, higher damage

Snout: Faster attack speed

Spire: feather falling

Tide: Depth strider

Vex: Projectile protection

Ward: Explosion protection

Wayfinder: Speed boost

Wild: Health boost
